extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked from La Redoute with 30km remaining and soloed to victory by 48 seconds over the chase group.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked La Redoute summit with 30km remaining, rare winning move from that climb in modern editions.
VAN AERT Wout sprinted for podium from chase group despite being pre-race favorite, revealing climbing deficit on decisive climbs.
Quick-Step isolated EVENEPOEL after Côte de la Roche-aux-Faucons, allowing solo time trial to finish without chase organization.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: soloed 30km after attacking La Redoute, winning margin of 48 seconds shows time trial strength translates to Monument attacks
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: reduced to sprinting for podium from chase group, caught behind on decisive La Redoute attack despite favorite status
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: finished in chase group sprint after being positioned second wheel, strong result without team support
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: finished with chase group despite weaker time trial credentials, climbing legs matched favorites until Redoute
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: seventh place in final LBL appearance shows competitiveness at age but couldn't follow EVENEPOEL's Redoute acceleration
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: abandoned early in race despite being pre-race team leader for strong EF squad
